etimesSmart Government in 2026: 6 apps making everyday services easier for IndiansGovernment services in India are becoming more accessible through mobile apps, simplifying processes that once required extensive paperwork and in-person visits. Apps like DigiLocker, BHIM UPI, UMANG, DigiYatra, NextGen mParivahan, and the AIS App now allow citizens to manage documents, make payments, access information, and streamline travel, transforming daily interactions with public services.

etimesMan wakes up with bright blue skin, rushed to hospital; unexpected reason revealed laterA man in the UK experienced a shocking transformation after waking up completely blue. Tommy Lynch's skin turned a vibrant blue overnight. Doctors were initially concerned and began urgent tests. The surprising cause was revealed to be dye from new, unwashed navy blue bedsheets. It took several days for the colour to wash off.
